summary: Iteration 224 — Image priority, breed isolation, Build Plan modals, and admin endpoints fully verified. All 20 backend pytest tests pass. All 3 mobile Build Plan modals (Play/Go/Dine) open MiraPlanModal correctly. Breed isolation confirmed for Mojo/Indie, Mystique/Shih Tzu, Bruno/Labrador. Admin generate-image col fix verified. DB sync endpoint functional.

design_issues.screen: Play page (on first load without pre-selected pet)
issues: MiraPlanModal shows 'your dog's Play Plan' instead of pet name on first open before pet context loads — acceptable UX, not a blocking bug

critical_code_review_comments: ProductCard.jsx getValidImage() has duplicate step comment numbers (comments say '// 3.', '// 4.', '// 5.', '// 6.' after the first 6 steps) — cosmetic issue, not functional
Care page (/care): Shows 'No Care Products yet for Mojo' for Indie breed — empty state handled gracefully via MiraEmptyRequest, but care products for Indie may need to be seeded/added in admin
MiraPlanModal: /api/mira/plan returns 404 as expected — modal falls back to static FALLBACK_CARDS correctly for all pillars

success_rate.frontend: 100% (Play/Go/Dine Build Plan modals verified, SoulMadeModal loads correctly, product images showing on Dine/Learn pages)

context_for_next_testing_agent: All iteration 224 features verified: (1) watercolor_image is FIRST priority in ProductCard.jsx getValidImage(), getValidProductImage(), BirthdayBoxBrowseDrawer.jsx, SoulMadeModal.jsx - all correct. (2) Breed isolation: /api/mira/claude-picks/{pet_id}?entity_type=product&breed=Indie returns ZERO Labrador/Akita/Corgi products for Mojo. Same verified for Mystique (Shih Tzu) and Bruno (Labrador). (3) Build Play Plan → MiraPlanModal(pillar=play) opens with fallback cards (Outdoor Adventures, Playdate, Fitness, Enrichment). (4) Plan Next Trip → MiraPlanModal(pillar=go) opens with travel cards. (5) Build Food Plan → MiraPlanModal(pillar=dine) opens with food cards. (6) POST /api/admin/sync-image-fields returns {success:true, synced:{breed_products_synced:N, products_master_synced:N}}. (7) POST /api/admin/generate-image with entity_type=breed_product works without undefined col error. (8) SoulMadeModal loads products immediately (not stuck on Loading). (9) Dine page product images: 29 real cloudinary images found. (10) Learn page product images: 16 real images found. (11) Care page for Mojo/Indie shows empty state (no care products for breed) — handled gracefully.
